titleStmt.title: SII 18.107: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 107. (B.K. No. 151 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This fragmentary inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva, is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 29, Tāraṇa, Kārttika s11u. 11, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1104, October 30, Sunday, f.d.t. ·72.

It records a grant of land made by Dēhārada Padmarasa for charity feeding (anna-dāna), for the merit of Nimbaṇayya-Daṇḍanāyaka and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Udeyādityarasa. It also records a gift made by Siṅgarasa for the merit of his father Udeyādityarasa. The details of the gift are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara para
mabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanama
lladēvaru kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍi
noḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi śrīmaccā
ḷukyavikramakālada 29 neya tāra
ṇasaṁvatsarada kārttika sudda 11 Ādivāra
daṁdu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṁḍanāyakaṁ dēhā
rada padmarasaru Eḷamela manneyaṁ śrīmanma
hāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ siṁgarasargge nūṟugadyāṇaṁ te
koṭṭu niṁbaṇayyadaṇḍanāyakarigaṁ
śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaranudeyāditya
rasarggaṁ śrēyassayāge Annadānakke
biṭṭa mattaru 100 banadahaḷḷiyalu rāmē
śvaradēvariṁ teṁkaṇadeseyalu hāleya ma
ṇalalu tōṭaṁ mattaru 2 © svasti śrīmanma
hāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ siṁgarasaru tammayyanu
deyādityarasarggaṁ lokkiya ba The continuation is broken off.
Digital edition of SII 18.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
